channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: Aluminium: Chinese output above cap on price incentives – Commerzbank
item.description: Commerzbank's FX & Commodity Analyst Volkmar Baur reports that Chinese Aluminium production has risen nearly 3% year-on-year and is running above the government’s annualized cap, supported by higher Aluminium prices and redirected Alumina flows as the Strait of Hormuz remains blocked. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: The USD is little changed vs major currencies - EUR, JPY and GBP - to kickstart the day
item.description: As North American traders enter the session, markets are relatively mixed. U.S. equities are showing modest divergence in pre-market trading, yields are little changed, and oil prices are higher by roughly $3. The USD initially moved higher before giving those gains back, and is now trading near unchanged levels. However, as is often the case ahead... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: PMI U.S. To Launch Business Solutions Center In Tampa, Florida
item.description: (RTTNews) - Philip Morris International's U.S. businesses announced an investment of approximately $50 million in a new Business Solutions Center in Tampa, Florida. It will create approximately 180 direct and indirect high-skilled jobs. The new Business Solutions Center will be l Fuente: Nasdaq FX

item.title: Gold: Fed caution and strong Dollar cap upside – Commerzbank
item.description: Commerzbank’s Commodity Analyst Carsten Fritsch notes that Gold has fallen about 5% since the Iran war began, struggling to act as a safe haven as a stronger Dollar and repriced Fed expectations weigh. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: investingLive European FX news wrap: USD pullback extends, markets remain rangebound
item.description: Investors are most long commodities since April 2022; stock market sentiment turns bearish Iran's Supreme Leader says "not the right time for peace", US and Israel must be defeated Germany March ZEW economic sentiment index -0.5 vs 39.0 expected Strait of Hormuz disruption keeps oil prices supported; de-escalation is the only fix Italy February fin... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: AUD/USD recovers as RBA's hawkish tone offsets concerns over split decision
item.description: AUD/USD trades around 0.7090 on Tuesday at the time of writing, up 0.25% on the day, rebounding after an initial pullback following the Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) monetary policy decision. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Investors are most long commodities since April 2022; stock market sentiment turns bearish
item.description: Global investors turn bearish as Iran and private credit concerns end "frothy bull" sentiment Net 45% of investors expect higher global CPI in the next 12 months, up from 9% a month ago Net 17% of investors expect lower short-term rates, lowest since February 2023 and down from 46% a month ago Measure of risk sentiment drops to 5.6 from 8.2 a month... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: AUD: Bittersweet hike with stretched positioning – ING
item.description: ING’s Francesco Pesole notes the Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) delivered a split 25 bp hike to 4.10%, initially read as dovish and triggering a sell-the-fact move in AUD/USD before a rebound on Governor Bullock’s comments. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: German ZEW collapses to -0.5 on rising stagflation risks
item.description: Germany’s ZEW Economic Sentiment plunged sharply in March, highlighting how rapidly confidence is deteriorating under the weight of the global energy shock. The expectations index collapsed from 58.3 to -0.5, far below market forecasts of 39.0, while Eurozone sentiment followed suit, dropping from 39.4 to -8.5. The primary driver is the escalation ... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: EUR/USD Price Forecast: Struggles to extend recovery above 1.1530
item.description: The EUR/USD pair holds onto Monday’s gains slightly above 1.1500 during the European trading session on Tuesday. The major currency pair trades firmly as the US Dollar (USD) has come under pressure ahead of the Federal Reserve’s (Fed) monetary policy announcement on Wednesday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USD: Fed hike odds questioned as markets stabilise – TD Securities
item.description: TD Securities analysts note that US rates rallied as markets stabilised, with attention on Fed policy expectations and geopolitical headlines. While hike odds have risen, they pushes back, arguing the hawkish outcome is more likely a prolonged pause. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Germany March ZEW economic sentiment index -0.5 vs 39.0 expected
item.description: Prior 58.3 Current conditions -62.9 vs - 67.3 expected Prior -65.9 I had to double check the number because of the huge deviation. This is much lower than expected as the lowest forecast was 30.0. The US-Iran war and the surge in energy prices have certainly played a major role here. ZEW President Professor Achim Wambach said: “The ZEW Indicator ha... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: AUD/USD: RBA hikes keep Aussie supported – MUFG
item.description: MUFG’s Senior Currency Analyst Lee Hardman notes that the RBA delivered a second consecutive 25 bps hike to 4.10%, now the highest policy rate among G10 central banks, and that Australian Dollar gains versus the US Dollar were initially strong but faded. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Oro (XAU/USD) Hoy: Señales Técnicas y Fundamentales Apuntan hacia una Corrección - 17 marzo 2026
item.description: El XAU/USD registra señales de corrección técnica con debilidad en el gráfico diario y presiones fundamentales por un dólar fuerte y tasas estables. Fuente: DailyForex ES

item.title: USD/INR remains firm as FIIs selling and Iran conflict weigh on Rupee
item.description: The Indian Rupee (INR) trades lower against the US Dollar (USD) on Tuesday. The USD/INR pair rebounds to near 92.90 after a correction on Monday as the Indian Rupee resumes its downside journey amid the continuous outflow of foreign funds from the Indian stock market. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Strait of Hormuz disruption keeps oil prices supported; de-escalation is the only fix
item.description: FUNDAMENTAL OVERVIEW We saw a classic “sell the fact” reaction last week after the G7 economies and the IEA agreed to release a record 400 million barrels of oil from strategic reserves. Despite that, oil prices climbed back into triple-digit territory as hopes for a quick end to the war faded and disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz continued. Trum... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: AUD: RBA split hike clouds terminal rate – Standard Chartered
item.description: Standard Chartered strategist Nicholas Chia notes that the Reserve Bank of Australia raised the cash rate to 4.10% in a 5-4 split decision, largely debating timing rather than direction. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: AUD/USD Price Forecast: Struggles to lure buyers despite hawkish RBA; Fed decision awaited
item.description: The AUD/USD pair struggles to capitalize on the previous day's goodish rebound from sub-0.7000 levels and seesaws between tepid gains/minor losses through the early European session on Tuesday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: BoC: Policy hold as war risk lifts inflation – Rabobank
item.description: Rabobank Strategist Molly Schwartz and Christian Lawrence expects the Bank of Canada (BoC) to keep its overnight rate at 2.25% at the March 18 meeting and through year-end, despite elevated inflation and weaker activity. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USD/CAD Price Forecast: Consolidates around 1.3700 as focus shifts to Fed-BoC policy
item.description: The USD/CAD pair trades in a tight range around 1.3700 during the European trading session on Tuesday. The Loonie pair consolidates as investors await monetary policy announcements by the Bank of Canada (BoC) and the Federal Reserve (Fed) on Wednesday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Forex Hoy: El RBA Sube las Tipos de Interés al 4,10% - 17 marzo 2026
item.description: El Banco de la Reserva de Australia sube 0,25% como se esperaba; la inflación canadiense baja ligeramente; los mercados no esperan cambios en las tasas de la Fed Corte en 2026; el petróleo crudo WTI encuentra soporte en $94. Fuente: DailyForex ES

item.title: Forex Today: RBA Hikes Rates to 4.10% - 17 March 2026
item.description: Reserve Bank of Australia Hikes by 0.25% as Expected; Canadian Inflation Ticks Lower; Markets Expecting No Fed Rate Cut in 2026; WTI Crude Oil Finds Support at $94 Fuente: DailyForex

item.title: RBA: Close split keeps May hike in play – TD Securities
item.description: TD Securities strategists Prashant Newnaha and Alex Loo note the RBA lifted the cash rate by 25 bps to 4.10% in a narrow 5-4 decision, driven mainly by elevated domestic inflation and excess demand. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: BOJ’s Ueda says inflation rising toward 2% ahead of policy meeting - recap
item.description: BOJ Governor Ueda reiterates inflation progress and wage growth focus ahead of policy meeting. Summary: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda reiterated that underlying inflation is gradually accelerating toward the 2% target. He stressed that sustainable inflation must be supported by wage growth, reinforcing the BOJ’s long-standing policy condition. ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Event Guide: BOC Monetary Policy Statement (March 2026)
item.description: The Bank of Canada (BOC) is still widely expected to keep rates on hold for the time being, but markets are eager to see how the policy outlook changed with the ongoing US-Iran conflict. Here’s what to look out for. Fuente: BabyPips

item.title: Japan officials signal vigilance on yields, fiscal policy and FX as yen weakness persists
item.description: Japanese officials deliver coordinated policy remarks as markets watch for signs of support amid yen weakness. Summary: Japan’s Finance Minister Katayama and BOJ Governor Kazuo Ueda issued a series of remarks within minutes of each other, addressing fiscal policy, bond markets and currency dynamics. Katayama stressed that monetary policy tools, inc... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: BOJ’s Ueda says inflation rising toward 2% target ahead of March 18 &19 meeting
item.description: BOJ Governor Ueda says inflation is gradually moving toward target ahead of the March 19 policy meeting. Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda told parliament that underlying inflation is gradually accelerating toward the BOJ’s 2% target. He reiterated the central bank will adjust policy as needed to achieve stable and durable inflation at the target l... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Bank of Japan chief stresses need to hit 2% inflation backed by wage gains
item.description: TOKYO, March 17 : Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda said underlying inflation is accelerating toward the bank's 2 per cent target, stressing that price rises must be matched by solid wage gains.The remarks came ahead of the central bank's two-day policy meeting ending on Thursday, where the board is widely ex Fuente: NewsData EUR

item.title: Japan's underlying inflation accelerating toward BOJ target, Governor Ueda says
item.description: TOKYO, March 17 : Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda said on Tuesday underlying inflation was gradually accelerating toward the central bank's 2 per cent target."We will guide monetary policy appropriately so that Japan sustainably and stably achieves our 2 per cent inflation target," Ueda told parliament. Fuente: NewsData EUR

item.title: RBA set for second consecutive rate hike as Iran war fuels concerns over high inflation
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) is set to deliver another 25 basis points (bps) interest rate hike following its March monetary policy meeting on Tuesday, lifting the Official Cash Rate (OCR) to 4.10% from 3.85%. Fuente: NewsData EUR
